strengths: 10+ years of full-stack development with demonstrated expertise in primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) in recent roles at re:cinq and Optilyz
Current Staff Engineer role at re:cinq focuses on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generation, directly matching a required technical skill
Proven ability to design end-to-end features with cloud infrastructure (AWS CDK), databases (MongoDB, SQL), and containerization (Docker, Kubernetes)
concerns: Nest.js framework not explicitly mentioned despite being primary stack requirement; unclear if has specific hands-on experience with this framework
Required testing frameworks (Jest, Vitest, Playwright) not mentioned in skills or recent work; strong testing culture but tool-specific expertise undefined
Authentication, authorization, and security best practices not explicitly documented despite being listed as required technical skill
response.justification: Candidate exceeds experience requirements with 10+ years of full-stack development, including recent direct expertise in primary technologies. Current Staff Engineer role at re:cinq directly addresses AI-agent infrastructure, a required skill. Demonstrates proficiency with cloud platforms, databases, and containerization across multiple projects. Primary concern is that specific required frameworks (Nest.js, Vitest) and security best practices are not explicitly mentioned in resume; however, strong Node.js and testing background suggests these are likely documentation gaps rather than capability gaps. Overall, a well-qualified engineer with solid fundamentals and positive career trajectory.
